大女主爽文吧，女主有脑子有正义感。家人朋友也都很好。反派都是我讨厌的穿越系统类型，舒坦！！
最大的缺点是没完结","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":8,"text":"大女主爽文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774208367B1FA7111%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615483211120542526%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227602834360483449880%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773122034,"group_id":"7602834360483449880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有一个错别字可以逃脱我的法眼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ZuBxU9SXPhUKDvvMIJAkI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5e1bc1f09b74491292d4aa84fab2b2ac~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796200&x-signature=T%2B%2BFr9Nzzb2ma4XK5cL6ZwC5njw%3D","user_id":"544951790480110","user_name":"是橘橘♪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"544951790480110","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602834360483449880","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主正常人普通人】【情节正常不虐女，不搞雌竞】我们女主宝宝绝对不会受一点委屈，身体上，人格上，情感上，我都不允许她受伤，我会让她心想事成，事事顺利，平安健康。
避雷：这里没有甜甜的恋爱！脸谱化反派女二角色不能说没有，但总体较少，女性角色多以正常人为主，没有程序化爽文打脸情节！后续会渐入佳境，期待宝宝们入股
穿越成缝合爽文里的路人甲，苏棠发现这个世界人人有外挂，作为唯一没有系统的“老实人”，苏棠默默撸起袖子管闲事。
堂姐“带球跑”回归失败，哭着求她收拾烂摊子，她淡定拒绝：自作自受；
老板秦川想压榨员工发家致富，她反手送进工地改造；
企图剽窃文章科举成名，苏棠直接借力打力断了他的科举路，草包别想霍霍人。
朝堂之上，丞相、皇子手持攻略系统将她围住，眼神势在必得。
苏棠笑道：“丞相之位给我，让你的攻略进度比他快可好？”
……
当所有系统宿主争相追问她的外挂时，苏棠身后万里江河清明，百工安居乐业。
他们都没有正事儿干吗？
“我的系统？”
“是这世间本该有的正道。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a77f0f88acb88b1e41ab008f68ca485c","author":"二叨","author_id":"","book_id":"7602834360483449880","book_name":"系统泛滥，而我专治外挂","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7960人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602834453513110040","read_count":"7960","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"198227"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"80","tags":"古言脑洞,古代,学霸,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/61b26b6740f32a70ef18bec2b0ccb015~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392367&x-signature=SHH5vImgSpncParzqfGkHTW3hRk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4248122286407736","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033927E954CF4805D5B1FA7111"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18454,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18674,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":395},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616065987837838142","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看！棠棠从一开始就坚定不移的向着自己的目标前行，不受外界干扰，真的期待棠棠能当上丞相的那一天。所有带有系统，有目的性的人或许都是棠棠的过客，她顺从自己的心意，做着自己想完成的事，聪明坚定。作者大大真的很用心的在塑造自己笔下的主角，也没有说为了爽而出现不符合背景发展的物件，都是从从细枝末节一点点积累，作者大大加油！ദ്ദി˶ｰ̀֊ｰ́ ent_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别喜欢这一类的文，拉踩，没有雌竞，每个人的人物性格都很饱满，女主一心为了民生，在朝堂放光芒，作者大大说女主很普通，但在我看来女主一点都不普通，很聪明，通透，也很努力。
也有很好笑的地方，比如：
女主爹爹每逢上朝的日子，女主起的比她爹还早，然后打扮的比她爹还要正式，端坐在家里，谁叫也不出门，哈哈哈哈  这心思可以说是很有预谋了
关于设定：设定的是这个朝代也有女孩子当将军和女官的，虽然不多，但也有，这种设定也很好，优秀的女孩子有很多，在每个地方都散发着属于她的光芒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772696844,"group_id":"7602834360483449880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最近在忙，在开心，在寻找更好的自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N380qk3gIvso6BWc0xkul04=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b65ed0fb51064e528102de0769a8c90a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791742&x-signature=3b3Z1u3lU5USr9E4%2B71m9XXRYBI%3D","user_id":"211576134831060","user_name":"要开心丫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"211576134831060","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":3,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602834360483449880","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主正常人普通人】【情节正常不虐女，不搞雌竞】我们女主宝宝绝对不会受一点委屈，身体上，人格上，情感上，我都不允许她受伤，我会让她心想事成，事事顺利，平安健康。
